name: Swirly Kiss Flurry
outcome: Giggling, Gren unleashes a flurry of attacks, licking, kissing, and pecking [ThePlayerName]'s mouth and face, making him melt under the barrage of intimate, romantic sensations.
miss: A fierce tongue battle takes place between [AttackerName] and [TargetName]! Despite [AttackerName]'s initial advantage [TargetName] comes out on top, succeeding in temporarily driving [AttackerHimOrHer] back.
statusOutcome: In the midst of Gren's lavish kissing session, [TargetName] gulps down some of her sweet-tasting mucus. Immediately, [TargetName] feels himself get more relaxed and complacent. Your defense has been lowered!
